title: Tao Te Ching 17
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 17 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 17 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: The best ruler is one whose existence is barely known by the people. The next best is loved and praised.
